---
#title: "teaching"
listing:
  - id: ms-dshsc
    contents: "ms-dshsc"
    type: grid
    categories: true
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    feed: 
      categories: [R, Quarto]
  - id: short-courses
    contents: "short-courses"
    type: grid
    categories: true
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    feed: 
      categories: [R, Quarto]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
#knitr:
#  opts_chunk: 
#    collapse: true
execute: 
  echo: false
---
![](images/favicon.png){.profile-pic fig-alt="logo, a simple graph resembling Edinburgh skyline" fig-align="center" width="33%"}

# [TEACHING]{.second-color}
Here you can take a look at our portfolio of courses. 

## Master in Data Science for Health and Social Care

:::{#ms-dshsc}
:::

## Short courses
:::{#short-courses}
:::
